title: Is this registered financial advice?
description: No, this is an educational hackathon project. It explains concepts and builds illustrative plans, but every decision and its risk remains yours

title: Is it free?
description: Yes, completely free and educational. No card, no subscription, no hidden tiers.

title: How is it different from a normal chatbot?
description: It onboards you like a friend, builds a structured risk profile, generates a real fund-based plan you can simulate, and switches to Calm Mode when it senses panic.

title: Does it use live market data?
description: No live trading or live prices. Plans are built from a curated static dataset of fund categories, so the demo always works reliably.

title: What is Calm mode?
description: When you sound stressed ('Sell everything', 'I can't sleep'), NiveshMitra slows down, reassures you, and helps you avoid panic decisions.
